name: Vegetable Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup red or green cabbage, coarsely chopped
1 cup broccoli florets, broken into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the avocados, reserving the pits.
2. Coarsely mash the avocado with a fork in a nonmetallic bowl. Set aside any that might be too hard to mash easily.
3. Pour the grapefruit juice and lime juice into a blender.
4. Add the shallot and 2 sprigs each of parsley and cilantro to the blender.
5. Blend on high until liquified.
6. Add the blended mixture to the mashed avocado, mixing gently.
7. Add the remaining vegetables, basil, and thyme. Stir well.
8. Garnish with the reserved cilantro and parsley. If not serving immediately, place in a small bowl with avocado pits, cover, and refrigerate. The avocado pits will keep the mixture from turning brown.
